basics.name: Prince Paulose
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer
basics.summary: Senior Software Engineer with 7+ years of experience. I build end-to-end products — React on the front, Node.js and AWS on the back, with a strong eye for system design and scalable architecture. I've led cross-functional engineering teams, mentored junior developers, and shipped products used by thousands. I write clean, production-grade code and take full ownership of what I build.

highlights: Led front-end delivery of an enterprise data marketplace platform used across a global organisation to publish, discover, and govern data at scale.
Built the full data product lifecycle UI in React + TypeScript — covering authoring, publication, version control, and role-based access management.
Delivered end-to-end consumer subscription flows including search, filtering, approval workflows, and access provisioning.
Engineered multi-modal data delivery features supporting high-performance live streaming, direct downloads, and delivery to external analytics platforms.
Drove frontend quality through comprehensive E2E test coverage, observability pipeline setup, and performance profiling.
Led a 5-engineer team delivering a large-scale incident and operations management platform across multiple regions.
Designed a Node.js + GraphQL Backend-for-Frontend (BFF) layer that reduced frontend API calls by ~30–40% and improved response times.
Built a shared React component library that cut feature development time and improved cross-team code consistency.
Integrated an in-app onboarding flow that improved user activation rates and reduced support queries.
Received the GEM Award for outstanding architectural ownership and on-time delivery.
Architected a low-latency event platform with WebRTC + Socket.io supporting 10,000+ concurrent users with real-time video and messaging.
Built a drag-and-drop course creation engine in React for a global education platform across 30+ countries.
Designed IoT analytics dashboards processing 5,000+ events/sec using React and WebSocket-based data streaming.
Developed a React Native mobile app for an IoT monitoring platform, achieving full feature parity on iOS and Android.
Mentored junior engineers and established full-stack best practices across code reviews, architecture, and CI/CD workflows.
Built a full-featured e-commerce application using Django and MongoDB covering cart, orders, and authentication.
Contributed to REST API development and database schema design under senior mentorship.

projects.name: Smart Expense Tracker
projects.description: Full-stack financial management platform on a decoupled microservices architecture. Features JWT-based auth, event-driven data consistency, and normalised Redux Toolkit caching for high-performance UI rendering.

awards.title: GEM Award
awards.summary: Going the Extra Mile — awarded at Capgemini for architectural ownership and delivery excellence.
